mapper.select: SELECT rp.request_id, rp.user_id, rp.title, rp.content, rp.created_at, u.display_name AS author_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUEST_COMMENT rc WHERE rc.request_id = rp.request_id AND rc.del_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM REQUEST_POST rp JOIN USER u ON rp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE rp.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY rp.created_at DESC, rp.request_id DESC

SELECT rp.request_id, rp.user_id, rp.title, rp.content, rp.created_at, u.display_name AS author_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUEST_COMMENT rc WHERE rc.request_id = rp.request_id AND rc.del_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM REQUEST_POST rp JOIN USER u ON rp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE rp.request_id = #{requestId} AND rp.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' LIMIT 1

SELECT rc.request_comment_id, rc.request_id, rc.user_id, rc.content, rc.created_at, u.display_name AS author_name FROM REQUEST_COMMENT rc JOIN USER u ON rc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE rc.request_id = #{requestId} AND rc.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY rc.created_at ASC, rc.request_comment_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REQUEST_POST ( user_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N' )
INSERT INTO REQUEST_COMMENT ( request_id, user_id, content, created_at, updated_at, del_yn ) VALUES ( #{requestId}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW(), 'N' )
mapper.select: SELECT rp.request_id, rp.user_id, rp.title, rp.content, rp.created_at, u.display_name AS author_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REQUEST_COMMENT rc WHERE rc.request_id = rp.request_id AND rc.del_yn = 'N' ) AS comment_count FROM REQUEST_POST rp JOIN USER u ON rp.user_id = u.user_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY rp.request_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT rc.request_comment_id, rc.request_id, rc.user_id, rc.content, rc.created_at, u.display_name AS author_name FROM REQUEST_COMMENT rc JOIN USER u ON rc.user_id = u.user_id WHERE rc.request_id = #{requestId} AND rc.user_id = #{userId} AND rc.del_yn = 'N' AND u.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY rc.request_comment_id DESC LIMIT 1
